reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para el viajero, tiene un predio para poder tirar algo de carne a la parrilla con mesas y asientos, y descansar bien, la proveeduría buena, hay duchas y baños limpios, altamente recomendable para los viajantes !!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place for travelers! It has a barbecue area with tables and chairs, and a good place to relax. The store is good, and there are clean showers and restrooms. Highly recommended for travelers!
